name: createya-mcp
description: Create images and videos through Createya's MCP server with bundled creative workflow skills.

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Createya for AI image and video generation through one MCP server. Includes Createya model-catalog workflows and a Creative Director skill for product shoots, UGC, lookbooks, character sheets, and visual campaign planning.
defaultPrompt: Use Createya to generate an image from this brief
Use Creative Director to plan a product shoot
Use Createya to check available models
